title: 5 Hidden Gems on Paramount+: Unmissable Movies to Stream Right Now - Tom's Guide
body:
In the vast library of Paramount+, it's easy to get lost in the sea of popular titles and forget about some of the lesser-known gems hidden within. However, these often-overlooked movies are just as worthy of attention as the blockbuster hits, boasting talented casts, thought-provoking storylines, and cinematic masterpieces. For those looking to mix up their viewing routine and discover something new, we've rounded up the top Paramount+ movies that deserve a watch.

Paramount+ has a treasure trove of films from various genres, and one such hidden treasure is the 2016 biographical drama 'Jackie'. Directed by Pablo Larraín and starring Natalie Portman as the former First Lady, this film delves into the tumultuous period surrounding President John F. Kennedy's assassination. Portman's incredible portrayal of Jacqueline Kennedy Onassis earned her an Academy Award nomination, cementing this movie's place in cinematic history.

Another under-the-radar movie on Paramount+ is the 2020 psychological thriller 'The Night House'. This gripping film tells the story of a widow who discovers her recently deceased husband's dark secrets, forcing her to confront the truth about his mysterious past. Starring Rebecca Hall and Evan Jonigkeit, 'The Night House' is a masterclass in building tension and features a standout performance from Hall as a woman pushed to the brink of desperation.

For fans of historical dramas, Paramount+ offers an exceptional choice in the 2019 film 'Dolemite Is My Name'. Directed by Craig Brewer and starring Eddie Murphy as the titular character, this biographical comedy-drama follows the life of Rudy Ray Moore, a comedian and actor who rose to fame in the 1970s. With Murphy bringing his signature wit and charm to the role, 'Dolemite Is My Name' is an entertaining and inspiring film that celebrates the power of perseverance and creativity.

Beyond the realm of drama and comedy, Paramount+ also features an impressive collection of science fiction and action films. One such standout is the 2019 sci-fi epic 'Star Trek: Picard', which follows the iconic character Jean-Luc Picard as he navigates a complex web of space politics and personal loss. With a talented ensemble cast and stunning visual effects, 'Star Trek: Picard' is a must-watch for fans of the Star Trek franchise and anyone looking for a thrilling adventure.

These movies are just a few examples of the many hidden gems waiting to be discovered on Paramount+. With so many options available, there's never been a better time to explore the platform and uncover your new favorite film. Whether you're in the mood for drama, comedy, or science fiction, Paramount+ has something for everyone. So why not mix up your viewing routine and give these overlooked movies a try? You might just discover a new favorite film and broaden your cinematic horizons in the process.
